unicode.value:
Hello! In this adventure you will:

  •  Learn new vocabulary about costumes and appearance
  • Ask and answer questions in English using the Present continuous
  • Work as a team to solve a mystery
  • Create an interactive infographic with Genially
  • Record your own podcast with GarageBand
What are we going to do?
What are we going to do? — Presentación de tareas

Estas son las 4 tareas que vamos a realizar:

1.   TAREA 1 - WHO IS AT THE PARTY? Aprendemos el vocabulario de los disfraces.

2.   TAREA 2 - ASK AND GUESS! Hacemos y respondemos preguntas en ingles con el present continuous.

3.   TAREA 3 - SOLVE THE MYSTERY! Resolvemos el misterio y creamos una infografia interactiva en Genially.

4. TAREA 4 - OUR FANCY DRESS PODCAST. Grabamos nuestro podcast.

Antes de resolver el misterio, necesitamos aprender las palabras clave.

 

Word

Meaning / Significado

wig

peluca

ear

orejas

beard

barba

hair

pelo / cabello

glasses

gafas

long hair

pelo largo

short hair

pelo corto

curly hair

pelo rizado

eyes

ojos

costume / fancy dress

disfraz

to wear / wearing

llevar puesto / llevando puesto

Watch this video for more vocabulary:
Enter the available choices here. You can add options by clicking the "Add Another Option" button. Delete options by clicking the red "X" next to the Option.

Type in the feedback that you want the student to see when selecting the particular option. If you don't complete this box, eXe will automatically provide default feedback as follows: "Correct answer" as indicated by the selection for the correct answer; or "Wrong answer" for the other options.
Enter a hint here. If you do not want to provide a hint, leave this field blank.
Select the correct option by clicking on the radio button.

Although more often used in formal testing situations MCQs can be used as a testing tool to stimulate thought and discussion on topics students may feel a little reticent in responding to. When designing a MCQ test consider the following:
  • What learning outcomes are the questions testing
  • What intellectual skills are being tested
  • What are the language skills of the audience
  • Gender and cultural issues
  • Avoid grammar language and question structures that might provide clues
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.

When building an MCQ consider the following:
  • Use phrases that learners are familiar with and have encountered in their study
  • Keep responses concise
  • There should be some consistency between the stem and the responses
  • Provide enough options to challenge learners to think about their response
  • Try to make sure that correct responses are not more detailed than the distractors
  • Distractors should be incorrect but plausible
Enter the question stem. The quest should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.
What do you call the hair decoration that actors/actresses wear on their heads?

Observe las letras, identifique y rellene las palabras que faltan.

Su navegador no es compatible con esta herramienta.

We are going to create our digital costume card with Canva!

 Sigue estos pasos: / Follow these steps:

1.   Abre Canva for Education en tu tablet. / Open Canva for Education on your tablet.

2.   Abre el enlace a la plantilla de Canva. / Open the template link: https://canva.link/ecw0ct21ak9iyew

3.   Elige una imagen para tu personaje disfrazado. / Choose an image for your costume character.

4.   Escribe frases en inglés para describirlo: 'My character is wearing...' / Write a sentence English and describe it.

5.   Guarda tu tarjeta y compártela en Teams. / Save your card and share it in Teams.

Watch the video to help with your descriptions!

Antes de publicar nuestra tarjeta, vamos a pensar juntos...

Before we publish our card, let's think together...

 

Preguntas para reflexionar: / Questions to think about:

•     ¿Que informacion hemos puesto en nuestra tarjeta? / What information have we put on our card?

•     ¿Es seguro poner nuestra foto real en internet? / Is it safe to put our real photo on the internet?

•     ¿Que diferencia hay entre un disfraz y nuestra identidad real? / What is the difference between a costume and our real identity?

 

Remember: online we only use our first name. We never share surnames, real photos or addresses.
Provide instruction on how the True/False Question should be completed.
Enter any feedback you wish to provide to the learner. This field may be left blank. if this field is left blank default feedback will be provided.
A hint may be provided to assist the learner in answering the question.

True/false questions present a statement where the learner must decide if the statement is true. This type of question works well for factual information and information that lends itself to either/or responses.
Type the question stem. The question should be clear and unambiguous. Avoid negative premises as these can tend to be ambiguous.
Escriba la pregunta. La pregunta debe ser clara y no ambigua. Evite las premisas negativas ya que esta tienden a ser ambiguas.
We always share our personal pictures on Internet so everybody knows who we are :)

Introduzca la retroalimentación que quiere que vean los estudiantes después de haber intentado completar la actividad. Este campo se puede dejar vacío. Si este campo está vacío se ofrecerá la retroalimentación por defecto.
We NEVER share personal information on Internet. Keep it safe!
Se puede proporcionar una pista para ayudar al estudiante a responder la pregunta.

Completa la lista de cotejo marcando las casillas al realizar las actividades correspondientes.

Watch the video and repeat:
GUESS WHO? — The Costume Detective Game

How to play / Como se juega:

1.   One student picks a mystery character from the picture (don't tell). 

2.   The other students ask questions: 'Is he/she wearing a wig? Does he/she have curly hair?' 

3.   The student answers: 'Yes, he/she is.' / 'No, he/she isn't.' 

4.   Maximum 5 questions to guess! 

5.   Rotate roles!

2

Create your infographic and add 3 interactive buttons to describe your mystery character.

Genially

1) Draw a mystery character.

2) Take a picture and upload it on Genially.

3) Add a new sheet to the infographic and add the 3 interactive buttons to describe it.

Comprueba que completas todos los pasos porque tu infografía será evaluada. Good luck!

¿Qué voy a evaluar? ¡Súper logrado! (3) ¡Casi listo! (2) ¡A practicar más! (1)
Mi dibujo He hecho un dibujo genial que se ve muy claro y está bien pintado. He hecho el dibujo, pero me ha faltado un poco de color o algún detalle. El dibujo está un poco sucio o no se entiende bien qué he dibujado.
Grammar & Vocab He usado muy bien el Present Continuous y las palabras de disfraces sin fallos. He usado palabras de disfraces, pero me he confundido un poco con el inglés. No he usado las palabras de los disfraces ni el Present Continuous.
Información He explicado perfectamente quién es mi personaje y qué está haciendo. Se entiende, pero me ha faltado contar algún detalle importante. Hay muy pocas frases o lo que he escrito no tiene que ver con mi dibujo.

A podcast is an audio recording that you can listen to whenever you want. It is like a radio programme but digital.

Our podcast will be called 'Describe your costume!' and each of you will record your own episode in English.

We are going to record our podcast with GarageBand on the tablet.

1.   Open GarageBand on your tablet.

2.   Select 'Audio Recorder'.

3.   Press the red record button.

4.  Read your script out loud and clearly.

5.  Stop the recording and listen to it.

6. If you are happy with it, save it.

Esta actividad también será evaluada.
Provide instruction on how the cloze activity should be completed. Default text will be entered if there are no changes to this field.
Read and fill the gaps with your fancy dress description.
If this option is checked, submitted answers with different capitalization will be marked as incorrect.

Hello, everyone! My name is _____________ .

Today I am going to describe my fancy dress costume.

 

I am wearing a _________________________________ .

I also have _________________________________ .

My hair is _________________________________ .

I am also wearing _________________________________ .

Thank you for listening! Goodbye!
If this option is set, each word will be marked as the learner types it rather than all the words being marked the end of the exercise.

Enter the text for the cloze activity in to the cloze field by either pasting text from another source or by typing text directly into the field.

To select words to hide, double click on the word to select it and click on the Hide/Show Word button below.

More than one possible answer can be defined enclosing them with pipes (|). I.e.: |dog|cat|bird|

If left unchecked a small number of spelling and capitalization errors will be accepted. If checked only an exact match in spelling and capitalization will be accepted.

For example: If the correct answer is Elephant then both elephant and Eliphant will be judged "close enough" by the algorithm as it only has one letter wrong, even if "Check Capitalization" is on.

If capitalization checking is off in the above example, the lowercase e will not be considered a mistake and eliphant will also be accepted.

If both "Strict Marking" and "Check Capitalization" are set, the only correct answer is "Elephant". If only "Strict Marking" is checked and "Check Capitalization" is not, "elephant" will also be accepted.

Hello, everyone! My name is _____________ .

Today I am going to describe my fancy dress costume.

 

I am wearing a _________________________________ .

I also have _________________________________ .

My hair is _________________________________ .

I am also wearing _________________________________ .

Thank you for listening! Goodbye!

Today I am going to describe my fancy dress costume.

 

I am wearing a

Cloze exercises are texts or sentences where students must fill in missing words. They are often used for the following purposes:

  1. To check knowledge of core course concepts (this could be a pre-check, formative exercise, or summative check).
  2. To check reading comprehension.
  3. To check vocabulary knowledge.
  4. To check word formation and/or grammatical competence.

If your goal is to test understanding of core concepts or reading comprehension

Write a summary of the concept or reading long enough to adequately test the target's knowledge, but short enough not to induce fatigue. Less than one typed page is probably adequate, but probably considerably less for young students or beginners.

Select words in the text thatare key to understanding the concepts. Thesewill probably be verbs, nouns, and key adverbs.Choose alternatives with one clear answer.

If your goal is to test vocabulary knowledge

Write a text using the target vocabulary. This text should be coherent and cohesive, and be of an appropriate length. Highlight the target words in the text. Choose alternatives with one clear answer.

If your goal is to test word formation/grammar:

Write a text using the target forms. This text should be coherent and cohesive, and be of an appropriate length. Remember that the goal is not vocabulary knowledge, so the core meanings of the stem words should be well known to the students.

Highlight the target words in the text. Provide alternatives with the same word stem, but different affixes. It is a good idea to get a colleague to test the test/exercise to make sure there are no surprises!
Enter any feedback you wish to provide the learner with-in the feedback field. This field can be left blank.
Diana de Evaluación Educación Blanco Negro de Claudia Cuenca Ruiz

¿Qué miramos? ¡Súper logrado! (3) ¡Casi listo! (2) ¡A practicar más! (1)
Writing the script El guion está completo, bien ordenado y es muy fácil de seguir. Tenemos un guion, pero faltan algunas frases o está un poco desordenado. No tenemos un guion claro o es muy difícil de entender.
Grammar & Vocab Usamos genial el Present Continuous (I am wearing...) y vocabulario de disfraces. Usamos el Present Continuous pero con algún fallito, o nos faltan disfraces. No hemos usado el Present Continuous ni las palabras de disfraces.
Sound El volumen es perfecto y se escucha todo nítido, sin ruidos raros. Se escucha bien, aunque a veces hay ruidos o el volumen sube y baja. Se oye muy flojito o hay tanto ruido que no se entiende nada.
Acting ¡Parecemos actores de verdad! Ponemos mucha emoción y modulamos la voz. Actuamos bien, aunque a veces parece que estamos leyendo un poco serios. Leemos el papel sin ganas o muy rápido, como si no fuera una historia.
